Our Story

Empowering Nail Artists Worldwide

Where creativity meets recognition

How It Started

The NailRanks Story

NailRanks was born from a simple observation: nail artists are incredibly talented, yet they lack a dedicated platform to gain the recognition they deserve. Social media is oversaturated, algorithms are unpredictable, and there's no structured way to discover the best nail artists globally.

We built NailRanks to change that. It's a platform where nail artists can showcase their portfolios, users can vote for their favorites, and brands can connect with verified creators — all in one beautiful, community-driven space.

Whether you're a nail technician looking to grow, a beauty enthusiast exploring trends, or a brand seeking talent, NailRanks is your home.

Who It's For

Built for everyone in the nail art community

Nail Artists

Grow your audience, showcase your portfolio, and compete on a global stage. NailRanks gives artists the recognition they deserve.

Beauty Lovers

Discover jaw-dropping nail art, follow your favorite artists, vote in competitions, and stay ahead of beauty trends.

Brands

Find verified nail talent for collaborations, sponsorships, and brand campaigns — all in one place.

What We Offer

Everything you need in one platform

Upload Nail Art

Post your nail designs with photos, tags, and descriptions to build your personal portfolio.

Rate & Review Posts

Community-powered voting ensures the best work rises to the top authentically.

Participate in Competitions

Join themed contests, win prizes, and earn recognition from a global audience.

Build Personal Profiles

Your public profile showcases your best work, ranking, follower count, and achievements.

Our Mission

“Our mission is to build the world's most engaging nail art community — where every brushstroke gets the recognition it deserves.”

Join NailRanks Today

Be part of the first global nail art ranking community. Gain Founder Access and help shape the platform.

The first global ranking platform for nail artists — powered by public votes.
